news.t: Pacer ETFs Launches New Fund to Magnify Dividend Yield Exposure of the Nasdaq-100 Index by 600%

holdings.infoBox: QSIX is an equity ETF with a total of 108 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.46%, Apple at 6.50%, Micron Technology at 4.69%, U.S. Bank Money Market Deposit Account at 4.64%, and Microsoft at 4.33%.

overview.description: The Pacer Metaurus Nasdaq 100 Dividend Multiplier 600 ETF (QSIX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund tracks an index composed of the stocks in the Nasdaq-100 Index, long positions in Nasdaq 100 Dividend futures, and US Treasurys. The objective is to provide 600% of the ordinary yield of the Nasdaq-100 Index in exchange for reduced participation in its price performance. QSIX was launched on Sep 23, 2024 and is issued by Pacer.
infoTable: Metaurus Nasdaq-100 Dividend Multiplier Index - Series 600

data.title: Pacer ETFs Launches New Fund to Magnify Dividend Yield Exposure of the Nasdaq-100 Index by 600%
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $QSIX #Nasdaq--Pacer ETFs launches new dividend multiplier ETF, QSIX, giving investors six times the dividend yield of the Nasdaq-100.
